user.title: Configure Tesla Supercharger
user.description: Select a Supercharger location or enter a custom location slug. Data is fetched automatically from Tesla's API. Sensors will automatically update when prices change based on time-of-use schedules.

data_description.location_slug: Select from the list or manually type a custom slug name (e.g., 'vaterstettensupercharger', '426052').

confirm.title: Confirm Custom Location
confirm.description:
Found Supercharger successfully: **{name}**

Do you want to add this location to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to read location data file. Please check the JSON file exists and is valid.
error.invalid_location: Invalid location data in JSON file. Please verify the file format.
error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON data. Please verify you copied the complete JSON response from Tesla's website.
error.no_locations: No location JSON files found. Please create JSON files in the data directory with Tesla API response data.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check logs.

abort.already_configured: This Supercharger location is already configured.
